results.name: widow's peak
results.description: A V-shaped point in the hairline in the center of the forehead. Count Dracula has one of these.

results.name: wildfire (plane)
results.description: A plane filled with flames and lava, first seen in Mirage block.

results.name: will-o-the-wisp
results.description: Motes of light thought to lead travellers astray.

results.name: wind drake with set's mechanic
results.description: A 2/2 flyer for 3 with one of the set's iconic mechanics.

results.name: windlance
results.description: A defence weapon styled after one from Lord of the Rings.

results.name: windswept hair
results.description: Hair fluttering in the wind dramatically.

results.name: wineglass
results.description: A type of glass with a long stem and a wide base.

results.name: wingman
results.description: Creatures with flying that give other creatures flying until end of turn when they attack.

results.name: wink
results.description: One eye closed. See also [eyes closed](/tags/artwork/eyes-closed).

results.name: wish
results.description: Effects which allow you to bring in cards from outside the game.

results.name: wojek
results.description: The civil law enforcement branch of Boros, separate from the Boros army.

results.name: wolf cove
results.description: The Southern Water Tribe village where Sokka and Katara grew up.

results.name: wolverine
results.description: Actually has more in common with the weasel than with the wolf. Makes Wolverine from the X-Men seem a little sillier now knowing that, doesn't it?

results.name: wolverine (marvel)
results.description: Wolverine, from Marvel Comics. A title usually held by Logan, but Laura Kinney (X23) is also known by this name.

results.name: word-art-title
results.description: Art that includes the name of the card and is used to define such. Typically used for full art treatments such as Secret Lair cards.
